description: The MockupMouthTrackingSource component can be used to simulate the tracking data of a tracking device and be applied to any field that takes a IMouthTrackingSourceComponent.

fields.TongueRoll: The tongue roll into a burrito shape.
fields.LipUpperLeftRaise: The upper left lip raise amount.
fields.LipUpperRightRaise: The upper right lip raise amount.
fields.LipLowerLeftRaise: The lower left lip raise amount.
fields.LipLowerRightRaise: The lower right lip raise amount.
fields.LipUpperHorizontal: The shift side to side of the upper lip.
fields.LipLowerHorizontal: The shift side to side of the lower lip. (negative to positive 1)
fields.MouthLeftSmileFrown: The left frown/smile amount. (negative to positive 1)
fields.MouthRightSmileFrown: The right frown/smile amount. (negative to positive 1)
fields.MouthLeftDimple: push the area closest to the corners of the lips inwards on the left.
fields.MouthRightDimple: push the area closest to the corners of the lips inwards on the right.
fields.MouthPoutLeft: The mouth kissy amount on the left.
fields.MouthPoutRight: The mouth kissy amount on the right.
fields.LipTopLeftOverturn: The amount The top lip is flipping upwards on the left.
fields.LipTopRightOverturn: The amount The top lip is flipping upwards on the right.
fields.LipBottomLeftOverturn: The amount The top lip is flipping upwards
fields.LipBottomRightOverturn: how much the bottom right side of the lips is pushing outwards like duck lips.
fields.LipTopLeftOverUnder: The amount the top lip is going down to cover the bottom lip.
fields.LipTopRightOverUnder: How much the bottom right part of the lips is going behind the top right lip.
fields.LipBottomLeftOverUnder: The amount the bottom lip is going up to cover the top lip left.
fields.LipBottomRightOverUnder: The amount the bottom lip is going up to cover the top lip right.
fields.LipLeftStretchTighten: The amount the left side of the lips are pulling towards the outside.
fields.LipRightStretchTighten: The amount the right side of the lips are pulling towards the outside.
fields.LipsLeftPress: The amount the left side of the lips are pulling towards the inside.
fields.LipsRightPress: The amount the right side of the lips are pulling towards the inside.
fields.CheekLeftPuffSuck: The amount the left cheek is sucking inwards or being puffed out. (negative to positive 1)
fields.CheekRightPuffSuck: The amount the right cheek is sucking inwards or being puffed out. (negative to positive 1)
fields.CheekLeftRaise: How much the cheek area of the left side of the face is being pushed upwards (Usually caused by smile) (negative to positive one)
fields.CheekRightRaise: How much the cheek area of the right side of the face is being pushed upwards (Usually caused by smile) (negative to positive one)
fields.NoseWrinkleLeft: How much the left side of the nose is being pushed up.
fields.NoseWrinkleRight: How much the right side of the nose is being pushed up.
fields.ChinRaiseBottom: How much the bottom chin is being pulled up.
fields.ChinRaiseTop: How much the top chin is being pulled up.

usage: Attach to a slot and insert the component into another Component on an avatar like an AvatarExpressionDriver to test its value influences.
